name: Chili#1
recipeInstructions:
1. Place a plastic colander in a 2-quart microwave-safe casserole.
2. Combine the chopped onion, green pepper, and crumbled ground beef in the colander.
3. Microwave on high (or at 100% power) for 6 minutes, stirring once halfway through cooking.
4. Remove the colander from the casserole and pour off any drippings.
5. Turn the meat mixture into the casserole dish.
6. Add the tomato sauce, stewed tomatos, kidney beans, salt, chili powder, ground black pepper, and dry mustard.
7. Cover the casserole and microwave on high (or at 100% power) for an additional 10-12 minutes, stirring halfway through cooking.
8. Remove from the microwave and let rest, covered, for about 5 minutes before serving.
